citations.narrative:
The facility is not following the written Program of Veterinary Care (PVC). The PVC states that all animals over 6 months
of age are to be heartworm tested each year. In 2025, heartworm testing was only performed on 7 of the approximately
22 adults. Failure to perform sampling in accordance with a veterinary approved schedule may result in animals to not be
adequately protected against disease and/or can cause pain and distress. Correct by ensuring all sampling is performed
in accordance with the schedule approved by the Attending Veterinarian. Correct by 13-APRIL-2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a Facility Representative.
n

narrative:
3.13(a)(3) 
   
Veterinary care for dogs. 
The facility is not following the written Program of Veterinary Care (PVC). The PVC states that all animals over 6 months 
of age are to be heartworm tested each year. In 2025, heartworm testing was only performed on 7 of the approximately 
22 adults. Failure to perform sampling in accordance with a veterinary approved schedule may result in animals to not be 
adequately protected against disease and/or can cause pain and distress. Correct by ensuring all sampling is performed 
in accordance with the schedule approved by the Attending Veterinarian. Correct by 13-APRIL-2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a Facility Representative. 
 
 n
